title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vijay Sales International Enterprises! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vijay Sales International Enterprises:
Vijay Sales International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales International Enterprises!
